---
title: 'Pleasing women'
date: '2017-12-18T15:53:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6075986278737362536'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/pleasing-women.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir="ltr"><u>https</u>://www.artofmanliness.com/2010/07/18/stop-living-for-the-approval-of-women/</p>
<p dir="ltr">Now you&#8217;re a man. You fear confrontation. It&#8217;s intolerable for her to be upset with you. You&#8217;ll go to almost any length&#8212;and you have&#8212;to please her, to make your discomfort disappear&#8230;for the moment. Sound familiar?</p>
